title: ficus saxophila subsp. cardiophylla
intro: Ficus saxophila subsp. cardiophylla, also known as the Borneo banyan tree, is a subspecies of Ficus saxophila native to the tropical forests of Borneo. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Ficus saxophila subsp. cardiophylla include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
